Video.summary: Secret social accounts and suspicious behavior have Kashmir asking the Cutlers if this relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Thornton vs Jones

Video.summary: A woman accuses her cousin of crashing her car with the plaintiff's children inside.
Video.title: Mathis Take the Wheel

Video.summary: A Texas man suspects his girlfriend of cheating with the father of her children.
Video.title: Hicks vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: A six-year marriage is on the brink of divorce as Quincy sues husband Jeron for failing to pay the bills.
Video.title: King vs. Johnson

Video.summary: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.
Video.title: Harris vs. Harris

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana responds to an overturned vehicle. An intoxicated driver is found sleeping behind the wheel of his vehicle.
Video.title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Image.alt: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt attempts to find the man responsible for giving his girlfriend a black eye. A woman is arrested behind a closed business in the middle of the night.
Video.title: Abusing and Abusers

Video.summary: SWAT carries out a mission to arrest a man wanted for assault with a deadly weapon.
Video.title: SWAT vs. Dirty Harry

Video.summary: The SED act on a felony warrant. Deputy Miller breaks up an underage party in the woods.
Video.title: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Image.alt: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Video.summary: WENET breaks up a party to arrest a group of illegal Mexicans for cock fighting.
Video.title: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Image.alt: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Video.summary: A woman sues a former friend after bailing him out of jail.
Video.title: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Image.alt: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Video.summary: Darious claims his cousin barged into his car, got caught speeding, borrowed money to go to clubs, and more.
Video.title: On The Road

Video.summary: Plaintiff, Reprudentia, is suing a fellow Cameroonian countryman for the $5000 she gave him to buy her a car.
Video.title: Car Troubles

Video.summary: Candace is suing a used car salesman for a car she never kept. He claims that he offered her 15 cars.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Michael, a clown and Elvis Presley impersonator, is suing his talent agent for unpaid dues.
Video.title: Bonzo and the Hound Dog

Video.summary: Priscilla is suing her disabled mother for the money she borrowed to purchase her wheelchair.
Video.title: Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Image.alt: Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Video.summary: A baby mama and grandma clash over who fathered the baby boy!
Video.title: Baby Mama Drama

Video.summary: Dawn wants her unpaid wages. Stegen says the organizers didn't pay him so he wasn't obligated to pay her.
Video.title: The Exotic Erotic Ball

Video.summary: Christopher is suing his brother Ashlee for punches his tooth out over some spilled juice.
Video.title: My House My Couch

Video.summary: Hannah claims her roommate Monica smashed her belongings by throwing them off a balcony, suing for $680. Monica denies this, countering that Hannah stole and donated her things, filing a $1,000 countersuit.
Video.title: Roommates Rumble

Video.summary: Raoul Lopez sues ex Jessica Melendy for $5,000, claiming she stole his car and refuses to return it. Jessica argues he gave it to her willingly and countersues for $4,299.03, citing expenses during their relationship.
Video.title: Exes Clash Over a Car

Video.summary: Mary sues Theresa for $5,000, claiming she stole her three beloved dogs. Theresa says Mary gave them away after losing her home and refuses to return them or pay. It's a heartbroken owner versus a "kindhearted" caretaker in this canine battle.
Video.title: Dog-Sitting Disaster

Video.summary: Karen Steinhaus sues landscaper Don for $1,500, claiming he took her money but never completed yard work or removed a tree. Don, with 35 years of experience, counters that he did most of the job and delays were weather-related.
Video.title: Tree-Trimming Turmoil

Video.summary: Muharrem and Milos sue Peter for $5,000, claiming he wrongfully towed their car without police orders, causing lost wages. Peter countersues for $700, alleging the car had bogus plates and was on the street illegally.
Video.title: Tussle Over a Tow

Video.summary: Florence sues Lora, claiming the puppy she bought from her shop, Harley, was sick and cost $1,600 in vet bills. Lora insists the puppy was healthy at sale and denies responsibility for its condition after four months.
Video.title: You Sold Me a Sick Dog!

Image.alt: You Sold Me a Sick Dog!
You Sold Me a Sick Dog!
You Sold Me a Sick Dog!

Video.summary: Anthony Franco sues Anabel Orellana De Ramirez for $334.50, claiming she agreed to pay for extra luggage charges he covered to bring items for her family. Anabel denies owing him, saying the suit is revenge for rejecting his romantic advances.
Video.title: Suspicious Texts

Video.summary: Wendy Noe is suing her husband, Thomas, for $3,000, claiming he stole her cats, winter clothes, and furniture. Thomas denies the claims, saying Wendy didn’t want the cats and is suing to get back into his house.
Video.title: Drunken Domestic Drama

Video.summary: Cherry Smith sues neighbor Mitchell Martinez for $3,000, claiming his loud behavior damaged her mirror and door. Mitchell denies the accusations, calling Cherry a long-time complainer. He countersues for $1,000, alleging harassment and missed work.
Video.title: Neighbor Nightmare

Video.summary: A woman sues her father, who she says was a great role model who was always there for her, for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love vs Lease

Video.summary: Anthony claims he saw explicit text messages between the defendant and her ex, so he sues for unpaid loans.
Video.title: Raunchy Texts and Explicit Agreements

Video.summary: Ebony is here to get help for her brother who's opioid addiction worsened after his wife overdosed.
Video.title: Hooked on Opioids

Video.summary: Terry is suing his ex-wife because he lent her money for their daughter (18) to have surgery on her jaw.
Video.title: A Host of Issues

Video.summary: Anastasia is a hair stylist here to sue one of her clients for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.
Video.title: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Image.alt: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Video.summary: Delores says her twin sister agreed to split her medical bills when she became ill while planning her party.
Video.title: Bachelorette Party Gone Bad

Video.summary: A couple say they bought a trailer from their neighbor, but he never gave it to them; he says they called the police and made death threats against him, so he's counter-suing for harassment.
Video.title: Trailer Troubles

Video.summary: A man sues his ex-fiance for unreturned property and an engagement ring; she says she left him because he's a raging alcoholic and drug addict.
Video.title: Ring Wraiths

Video.summary: The mysterious disappearance of a prized Steelers jersey has Michelle and Ken's 23-year relationship on the line.
Video.title: Lozon vs. Lozon

Video.summary: After calling off their wedding, Smilez sues Dejsha for crashing his music video and breaking his $12,000 chain.
Video.title: Harrell vs. Watson

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom

Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: A stolen car and four slashed tires have exes Tiffany and Jonathan arguing in court over who is at fault.
Video.title: Martin vs. Polite

Video.summary: A marriage is on the line as accusations of betrayal and overprotection threaten two decades of love and business.
Video.title: Heard vs. Macon

Video.summary: Imani fights for proof of paternity when Dontel refuses responsibility, demanding DNA before committing to their 1-year-old son.
Video.title: Fann vs. Coleman
